production.description: Optimized for real ideation runs. Balanced thresholds, minimal logging.

debug.description: Full logging, relaxed thresholds for testing pipeline mechanics. More iterations allowed.

research_strict.description: Strict consensus for testing convergence. High thresholds force multiple iterations.

fast_test.description: Single-pass, no iteration. For quick testing of individual stages.

consensus_strategies.notes: weighted currently uses equal weights — TODO: add format-specific persona weights from audience config

iteration_loop.notes: Title revision triggers when ≥2 panelists flag packaging. Could extend to other stage-specific revisions.

inter_agent_messages.notes: Agents can request info via [REQUEST:agent_id: question]. Currently routed through _callAgent with 400 token limit.

audience_panel.notes: Personas are JSON configs in agents/audience/. Panel runs in parallel via Promise.all.
known_issues: TODO: Audience personas default to safe middle score (5/10). Improve scoring mechanics: stronger persona differentiation, anchoring examples in prompt, force-rank before scoring, pairwise comparison, require justification before number, temperature tuning per persona, few-shot examples of 2/10 and 9/10 reviews.

critic.notes: Single critic agent. Score/verdict parsed via regex from structured output.

pipeline_structure.notes: Linear sequential with critic gates. Audience loop is the only non-linear element.

todo: Audit all AI and hypothesis algorithms — verify statistical correctness, edge cases, multiple comparison correction, sample size requirements
From hypothesis to validation — connect significant hypothesis results to the ideation pipeline validation stage, so concepts are checked against data-backed evidence

From validation to insights — feed validation outcomes (green-light/revise/shelve + audience scores) back into the ML models as labeled training signal, closing the loop between creative output and measurable performance
ml_and_analytics.notes: Currently ML insights are one-directional: data → hypotheses → display. The loop back from ideation validation to ML is not yet implemented.
